---
title: gr20
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557418/gr20_20180810_wuqnxd.png
description: Vue sur la deuxième journée du GR20, Corse
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2018/08/12
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557418/gr20_20180810_wuqnxd.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
